name: Bill Pierce
abstract: Bill Pierce (also Billy Pierce) (born September 25, 1948, in Hampton, Virginia) is an American jazz saxophonist. He played with Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers in the early 1980s and in Tony Williams's quintet in the mid-1980s to early 1990s.

concerts.label: New York Jazz Repertory Company: The Music of George Russell
JVC Jazz Festival: Blue Note 50th Anniversary Concert
Carnegie Hall Centennial Festival: A Celebration of Jazz: The Carnegie Hall Jazz Band

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Kininger
